Skip to contents
srppphist 2.0.1
  • Reference
    • Products with the same name but different active ingredients in the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products
    • Trends of data contained in XML dumps of the Swiss Register of Plant Protection Products
  • Changelog

Table of active substance keys extracted from all years starting 2011

Source: R/srppphist-data.R
srppp_active_substances.Rd

Please note that products whose authorisation has expired remain in the files until the end of the period during which use by the end user is still permitted. Therefore, the latest year given in this dataset means the latest year where a use up period ('expirationDeadline') of at least one product containing the substance had not expired in the beginning of the respective year.

Usage

srppp_active_substances

Format

A tibble::tibble, resolving the primary keys ('pk') of the active substances to the latest entry in any of the 'substances' tables in srppp_list. The earliest and the latest year of occurrence are given in the columns 'earliest' and 'latest'.

Details

Please see srppp_substances and srppp_substances_merged for details on the different primary keys used in these tables.

Note

Note that a substance occurring in the register in a certain year does not necessarily mean that a product containing the substance was authorized. In particular, a number of products with such comments are present in the register used as representative for 2011.

See also

srppp_active_substances_merged, srppp_substances, srppp_products

Examples

print(srppp_active_substances, n = Inf)
#> # A tibble: 927 × 8
#>     pk              earliest latest iupac substance_de substance_fr substance_it
#>     <chr>              <int>  <int> <chr> <chr>        <chr>        <chr>       
#>   1 0                   2011   2012 (±)-… Propiconazo… "propiconaz… "Propiconaz…
#>   2 3                   2011   2025 1-na… 1-Naphthyla… "1-naphtyl … "Acido 1-na…
#>   3 4                   2011   2025 (2,4… 2,4-D        "2,4-D"      "2,4-D"     
#>   4 8                   2011   2025 aver… Abamectin    "abamectine" "Abamectina"
#>   5 10                  2011   2011 O,S-… Acephate     "acéphate"   "Acefato"   
#>   6 13                  2011   2025 2-ch… Aclonifen    "aclonifène" "Aclonifen" 
#>   7 18                  2011   2011 ethy… Alanycarb    "alanycarbe" "Alanycarb"
